import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut sign = 1
  mut cur = 0
  mut have = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if have
          result = list.push(result, sign * cur)
          cur = 0
          sign = 1
          have = false
        end
      else if b == 45
        sign = -1
      else if b == 43
        sign = 1
      else
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        have = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have
    result = list.push(result, sign * cur)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    mut max_val = 0
    mut max_idx = 0
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    let n = remaining.len()
    while i < n
      match remaining.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if first
          max_val = v
          max_idx = i
          first = false
        else if v > max_val
          max_val = v
          max_idx = i
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    result = list.push(result, max_val)
    mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    while j < n
      if j != max_idx
        match remaining.get(j)
        when Some(v)
          new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_rem
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = io.read_line()
  let line2 = io.read_line()
  match line1
  when Some(s1)
    match line2
    when Some(s2)
      let nums = parse_ints(s1)
      let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
      let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(s2))
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      let total = sorted.len()
      let take = if k > total
        total
      else
        k
      end
      mut out = ""
      mut i = 0
      while i < take
        match sorted.get(i)
        when Some(v)
          if i == 0
            out = "#{v}"
          else
            out = "#{out} #{v}"
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
      println(out)
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
